[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 1100110 4
2 0111100 4
3 1011011 5
4 0010101 3
5 0010010 2
6 1001011 4
7 0011111 5

01 10 1111110 6
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1011111 6
34 43 0010111 4
45 54 1011011 5 match 3
56 65 1011111 6
67 76 0111111 6
70 07 1110110 5

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 0111101 5
24 42 1011011 5 match 3
35 53 1011111 6
46 64 0011111 5 match 7
57 75 1111011 6
60 06 1111111 a
71 17 0111100 4 match 2

03 30 1110111 6
14 41 0111110 5
25 52 1011011 5 match 3
36 63 0011111 5 match 7
47 74 0110010 3
50 05 1101111 6
61 16 0111111 6
72 27 1111011 6

04 40 1110110 5
15 51 1111111 a
26 62 1011111 6
37 73 0110101 4
